expectations.evidence: Called get_asset with correct asset_id and customer_id. Returned: name=Arendonk, type=energy group, timezone=Europe/Brussels.
Called get_asset_config. Returned: type=energy group, is_nominated=true.

Called get_asset_integrations but got no output. Remote MCP serialization issue with array responses (even empty arrays). The asset likely has no integrations, but the empty-array-as-no-output is confusing.
Called get_asset_steering_config but got error: 'Unexpected return type from tool: NoneType'. The asset has no steering config (returns null), but remote MCP can't serialize null responses.
All 4 calls were made in the same message (parallel).
Despite the integration/steering errors, the available data (asset details + config) was retrieved and can be presented clearly.

issues_found: Remote MCP cannot serialize null responses (get_asset_steering_config returns NoneType error when asset has no steering config).
Remote MCP cannot serialize empty array responses (get_asset_integrations returns no output for assets with no integrations).
The skill should instruct Claude to handle these gracefully: null/error from steering means 'no steering configured', empty/no-output from integrations means 'no integrations linked'.
